## Demo page

- [ ] Demo page updated to reflect this change (if applicable)
- [ ] New component has a working demo example

## Documentation

- [ ] Props table / API docs updated in README or Storybook
- [ ] JSDoc comments added for new/changed props
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added

## Checklist before requesting a review

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] Component renders correctly in light and dark themes
- [ ] Responsive behaviour verified (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] TypeScript types are accurate — no `any` escape hatches
- [ ] If it is a new component, I have added thorough tests
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard navigation and screen reader tested
- [ ] Bundle size impact is reasonable (note any significant increase)

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this changes a component's API, list what consumers need to update. Leave blank if none. -->

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — trade-offs, open questions, follow-up work. -->
